summary: Test harness follows TDD methodology and validates main code paths (JUnit/JSON parsing, flaky detection, mixed formats) but has significant gaps. Critical issue: violates the 3 act-run constraint by executing 4 separate act commands despite comments claiming batching. No error scenarios tested (malformed files, missing fields, invalid input). No boundary conditions (empty results, single test, special characters). No edge case coverage (truncation, unicode, zero duration). Fixtures are not shown in test code, preventing full evaluation of input coverage. Design is brittle with hardcoded expected values and substring matching. Comments claim efficiency optimization that isn't implemented in code. Missing negative tests for all error handling paths in aggregator.py.
